title: The Problem Solvers | Michael Truell at Cursor
summary: Cursor is an AI-native coding platform that helps engineers and developers ship code through agents. Founded by Michael Truell, it has grown from 15 people to 700 employees and is used by over 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The platform has partnered closely with Anthropic and Claude throughout its growth.
writeup: This Claude video profiles Cursor and its founder Michael Truell, framing the company as an AI-native coding platform where agents help engineers and developers ship code. It traces Cursor's growth from 15 people to 700 employees, with adoption across more than 60% of Fortune 500 companies. The profile notes Cursor's close partnership with Anthropic and Claude through that expansion, situating code generation agents as the core of the product.
